new_claims.claim_text: Iran OFFICIALLY CLOSES the STRAIT OF HORMUZ until further notice due to Israel’s attack on Lebanon - Fars New Agency
new_claims.notes: Claim from a known controversial account, citing Fars News Agency. Requires independent verification due to high geopolitical impact.

new_claims.claim_text: BREAKING: 3 Kuwaiti power stations & water distillation plants were struck by Iranian drones this morning, causing significant damage
new_claims.notes: Claim from a known controversial account, significant escalation if true. Requires independent verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran says it will withdraw from the US ceasefire agreement if Israel continues to violate it by attacking Lebanon.
new_claims.notes: Claim from Al Jazeera, citing Tasnim News Agency (Iranian source). Represents a stated intent of Iran. Requires independent verification/confirmation from non-Iranian sources.
